mapper.insert: INSERT INTO houses ( host_id, name, address, price, max_guests, description, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{hostId}, #{name}, #{address}, #{price}, #{maxGuests}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT house_id, host_id, name, address, price, max_guests, description, status, created_at, updated_at FROM houses WHERE house_id = #{houseId}
